name: anemia
title: best herbal teas for anemia
description: Foeniculum vulgare tea contains bioactive constituents such as estragole, limonene, and trans-anethole, which have been found to have therapeutic properties in treating anemia. The tea's diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties help to reduce oxidative stress and promote the production of red blood cells, thereby alleviating anemia symptoms.
